title: SyncRunResult — outcome persisted to core.sync_runs.result
description: JSON Schema for the result JSONB column on core.sync_runs (src/will/governance/sync_runner.py). Two distinct shapes depending on sync_type: (A) dev_sync — DevSyncWorkflow.model_dump() producing a WorkflowResult shape; (B) all other sync_types — an ActionResult summary dict built inline. The sync_type discriminator is stored on the run row, not in the result dict. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (persistence-boundary contract). Uses .schema.json suffix — intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

oneOf.description: Shape A — dev_sync: WorkflowResult.model_dump() (src/shared/models/workflow_models.py:48). Produced when sync_type='dev_sync'.

workflow_id.description: Registered workflow identifier. Set on DevSyncWorkflow construction.

phases.description: list[WorkflowPhase] — ordered phase results. Each phase has: phase_name (str), ok (bool), duration (float), actions (list[ActionResult]).

oneOf.description: Shape B — action-based sync types (db, code_vectors, intent, etc.): inline ActionResult summary dict. Produced for all sync_types except 'dev_sync'.

ok.description: Whether the underlying AtomicAction reported success.

data.description: ActionResult.data — the action's structured output dict. Shape is action_id-specific.

duration_sec.description: ActionResult.duration_sec — wall-clock duration of the action in seconds.

action_id.description: The AtomicAction id that was executed (e.g. 'sync.db', 'sync.vectors_code', 'sync.intent').
